case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. JORLAN PARLERO et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED JUL-11-2014, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PARLERO, JORLAN
DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARLERO, JORLAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1190 MISSION ST., APT. 0210, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT PARLERO, JORLAN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT PARLERO, JORLAN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PARLERO, JORLAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF MAILING ATTACHED, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED JUL-11-2014, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT PARLERO, JORLAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PARLERO, JORLAN
